task_objective: Nail Design Generation & 9-View 3x3 - Generate 9 distinctly different nail design variations from Figure 1 nail shape line art + text prompt, nails-only, NO hand

input_assets.base_reference: Figure 1 Nail Shape Line Art - Nail shape, length, curvature, outline, proportions, spacing - LOCKED
input_assets.design_prompt: Text Prompt - Nail design description (base color, tip style, gradient, embellishments, 3D elements, aesthetic) - DESIGN SPECIFICATION

workflow.step_1: Parse Figure 1 nail structure + analyze text prompt design DNA (colors, patterns, embellishments, aesthetic)
workflow.step_2: Generate 9 visually distinct design variations on Figure 1 nail structure, each diverges along a UNIQUE creative axis while preserving core DNA
workflow.step_3: Assemble 3x3 grid, nails-only, cinematic grading, luxury white space

outputs.view_1: Original - Faithful reproduction of text prompt on Figure 1 nail structure. BENCHMARK
outputs.view_2: Complementary Palette - Invert color scheme to complementary opposites (nudeâ†”plum, whiteâ†”onyx, warmâ†”cool), same design structure
outputs.view_3: Monochrome - Reduce entire design to single-hue tonal variation of the dominant color, all embellishments in matching tone
outputs.view_4: Pattern Reinterpretation - Keep same color palette but change pattern execution (French tipsâ†’chevron, ombreâ†’marble swirl, solidâ†’animal print)
outputs.view_5: Material Swap - Keep same layout but replace all embellishment materials (crystalsâ†’pearls, 3D acrylicâ†’flat foil, rhinestonesâ†’studs, charmsâ†’decals)
outputs.view_6: Minimalist - Strip to bare essentials: base color + one accent element only, remove all 3D/layered embellishments, clean graphic lines
outputs.view_7: Maximalist - Double the decoration layers: add secondary embellishments between existing ones, introduce accent color highlights, stack 3D elements
outputs.view_8: Style Migration - Shift to a different nail art genre while keeping color DNA (bridalâ†’dark glamour, classicâ†’avant-garde, romanticâ†’geometric)
outputs.view_9: Texture Transformation - Change all surface finishes (glossâ†’velvet matte, smoothâ†’chrome mirror, clearâ†’frosted glass, solidâ†’glitter bomb)

output_requirements: NO text/labels/watermarks; NO hand/finger/skin â€” ALL views nails-only on Figure 1 structure
Figure 1 nail structure LOCKED; text prompt design DNA preserved as recognizable thread across all 9 variations
Each view must diverge along its UNIQUE creative axis ONLY â€” no cross-contamination between variation types
